overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking and running through a dense coniferous forest during a snowy, stormy dusk. The character navigates a winding dirt path surrounded by tall pine trees as weather conditions intensify from light snow to a heavy storm with darkening skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: open forest clearing with dirt path

events.description: light snow begins to fall, becoming progressively more visible

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the forest path as light snow begins to fall, heading toward denser trees ahead

entered.detail: dense cluster of tall evergreen trees surrounding the clearing
narrow dirt trail winding through the grass
grassy meadow area with scattered wildflowers
snow-capped mountain peaks visible through gaps in the trees

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path through an open forest clearing surrounded by tall pine trees. Light snow begins to fall as the character moves forward, with distant mountains visible through the tree line and grassy meadows on either side of the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest path near large ancient tree

events.description: character turns left to navigate around a large tree trunk blocking the path
character completes the turn and faces the camera directly, pausing briefly

agents.ego_description: turns left around a large ancient tree, then turns to face the camera directly before turning back to continue along the path

entered.detail: massive gnarled tree trunk with rough bark that the character navigates around

segments.scene_description: The character maneuvers around a large ancient tree trunk, turning left and then facing the camera directly. The surrounding grassy clearing gives way to denser forest as the character pauses to look toward the viewer before continuing past the obstacle.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest path with open stormy sky

events.description: sky darkens significantly as heavy storm clouds gather overhead
character transitions from walking to running as the storm intensifies

agents.ego_description: moves along the path as the storm intensifies, transitioning from walking to running while snow falls more heavily

entered.detail: dark grey storm clouds gathering overhead with visible precipitation

segments.scene_description: The character travels along the forest path as weather conditions worsen, with dark storm clouds gathering overhead. The lighting dims significantly as the character transitions from walking to running through the increasingly heavy snowfall, with mountains now visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow forest trail with dense tree coverage

events.description: path becomes narrower and more enclosed by dense vegetation and tree trunks

agents.ego_description: runs through a narrower section of forest with denser tree coverage and underbrush lining both sides of the path

entered.detail: thick bushes and low vegetation lining the narrow path

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrower, more enclosed section of forest with dense underbrush and thick tree coverage blocking much of the stormy sky. The path becomes tighter as the character continues moving forward through the dimly lit woodland environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a coniferous forest that transforms from a light snowfall in an open clearing into a dark, oppressive winter storm. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path flanked by grassy meadows and distant mountains under a light dusting of snow. As the character maneuvers around a large ancient tree trunk and turns toward the camera, the open clearing gives way to a denser woodland. The scene then shifts as dark storm clouds gather and the lighting dims significantly, prompting the character to transition from walking to running through increasingly heavy snowfall. Finally, the path narrows into an enclosed section of forest where thick tree coverage and dense underbrush block out the stormy sky, plunging the environment into dim light.
